result.post_video_description: Joko Widodo stands on a porch surrounded by lush greenery and vibrant flowers, wearing a white shirt, speaking with a smile. Text overlays read "Selamat siang semuanya.", "meskipun mohon maaf", "Bapak ibu semuanya", and "seluruh warga, masyarakat". A woman in a bright green shirt waves at a crowd, with people in similar green shirts visible, some holding banners with Joko Widodo\'s image. Groups of people gather outdoors near a house with tropical plants, smiling and interacting. An elderly man in a white shirt takes a selfie, with greenery and flowers in the background. People in casual clothing, including green shirts, stand and wave in a garden setting.

result.text:
Sudah template komunikasinya Jokowi dari dulu: ramah, sederhana, merakyat di permukaan, padahal banyak banget masalah struktural yang nggak kelar. Warga yang jauh-jauh dateng bawa harapan, cuma pulang dengan oleh-oleh janji “lain kali.”
